ipc package¶

Submodules¶

ipc.cleanup module¶

Explicit cleanup utilities.

Run this after crashes, or call from capture-pipeline shutdown.

ipc.cleanup.unlink_semaphore(name: str) → None¶
ipc.cleanup.unlink_shared_memory(name: str) → None¶

ipc.cleanup_ipc_script module¶

Cleanup script for shared memory and POSIX semaphores.

Run this if: - Producer crashed - You get “File exists” errors - Shared memory is stuck in /dev/shm

ipc.cleanup_ipc_script.main() → None¶

ipc.control_channel module¶

Structured control IPC: - Outbound capture-pipeline messages (status/warning/error) - Inbound control commands

class ipc.control_channel.CommandReceiver(channel: SharedTextChannel)¶

Bases: object

Thin wrapper around shared command channel.

try_receive(timeout_s: float = 0.0) → ControlCommand | None¶

Bases: object

Thin wrapper around shared command channel.

class ipc.control_channel.MessagePublisher(channel: SharedTextChannel)¶

Bases: object

Thin wrapper around shared message channel.

publish(level: str, message: str, *, source: str = 'capture_pipeline', details: Dict[str, Any] | None = None) → None¶

ipc.shared_ring module¶

Shared-memory ring buffer for frames + POSIX semaphores.

Design goals: - Single producer, multiple consumers. - Producer overwrites old frames (low latency). - Consumers read latest complete frame.

Header is protected by a mutex semaphore. Frame availability is signaled with a counting semaphore.

class ipc.shared_ring.FrameInfo(frame_id: 'int', ts_ns: 'int', width: 'int', height: 'int', channels: 'int')¶

Bases: object

channels: int¶
frame_id: int¶
height: int¶
ts_ns: int¶
width: int¶
class ipc.shared_ring.SharedFrameRing(shm: SharedMemory, frame_sem: Semaphore, mutex: Semaphore, width: int, height: int, channels: int, ring_size: int, frame_bytes: int)¶

Bases: object

Shared ring buffer containing raw frames.

Producer:

  • create=True

  • writes frames

  • owns unlink on shutdown

Consumer:

  • create=False

  • reads frames

  • only closes (no unlink)

classmethod attach(shm_name: str, frame_sem_name: str, mutex_sem_name: str) → SharedFrameRing¶
static calc_total_size(frame_bytes: int, ring_size: int) → int¶
property channels: int¶
close() → None¶
classmethod create(shm_name: str, frame_sem_name: str, mutex_sem_name: str, width: int, height: int, channels: int, ring_size: int) → SharedFrameRing¶
property frame_bytes: int¶
property height: int¶
read_latest_frame() → Tuple[FrameInfo, ndarray]¶

Read the most recent valid frame (low latency).

property ring_size: int¶
property shm_name: str¶
unlink() → None¶
wait_for_frame(timeout_s: float | None = None) → bool¶

Wait until at least one new frame is available. Returns True if acquired, False if timed out.

property width: int¶
write_frame(frame: ndarray, frame_id: int) → None¶

Write a frame into the ring.

frame: shape (H,W) if channels=1, else (H,W,C)

ipc.shared_text_channel module¶

Shared-memory text channel with POSIX semaphores.

Layout: - bytes[0:8]: unsigned 64-bit payload length - bytes[8:8+N]: UTF-8 payload bytes

class ipc.shared_text_channel.SharedTextChannel(shm: SharedMemory, mutex: Semaphore, notify: Semaphore)¶

Bases: object

Single-slot string transport over shared memory.

classmethod attach(shm_name: str, mutex_sem_name: str, notify_sem_name: str) → SharedTextChannel¶
close() → None¶
classmethod create(shm_name: str, mutex_sem_name: str, notify_sem_name: str, size_bytes: int) → SharedTextChannel¶
drain_notifications() → None¶

Clear pending notify count so future reads start fresh.

receive() → str¶
send(message: str) → None¶
property shm_name: str¶
property size_bytes: int¶
try_receive(timeout_s: float = 0.0) → str | None¶
unlink() → None¶
